mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (code, name, spec, image, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{spec}, #{image}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, spec, image, create_time, update_time FROM product WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, code, name, spec, image, create_time, update_time FROM product ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, code, name, spec, image, create_time, update_time FROM product
code like CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
name like CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
create_time like CONCAT('%', #{createTime}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE product
code = #{code},
name = #{name},
spec = #{spec},
image = #{image},
update_time = #{updateTime}
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM product WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT product.id AS product_id, product.code AS product_code, product.name AS product_name, product.spec AS product_spec, SUM(COALESCE(wo.quantity, 0)) AS total_plan_quantity, SUM(IF(wo.status = 2, wo.quantity, 0)) AS completed_quantity, SUM(IF(wo.status = 1, wo.quantity, 0)) AS producing_quantity, SUM(IF(wo.status = 0, wo.quantity, 0)) AS pending_quantity, SUM(IF(wo.status = 3, wo.quantity, 0)) AS closed_quantity FROM product LEFT JOIN work_order wo ON product.id = wo.product_id AND wo.create_time >= #{startTime} AND wo.create_time < DATE_ADD(#{endTime}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY product.id, product.code, product.name, product.spec ORDER BY product.id;
